name: Half-Hour Apple Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a heavy saucepan, stirring well.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 30 minutes, stirring often.
4. Let cool completely.
5. Pour mixture into a container of electric blender.
6. Process at High speed for 10 seconds or until smooth.
7. Store in refrigerator. Yield: about 2 cups.
